title: Adding optional pronouns display to profile
excerpt:
user profiles lack a place to fill in pronouns, this should be a fill-in form in the account options 
pronouns should also displays next to or under profile name in account and when hovering over someone’s profile on a b…

posts.author: lexrobertson (Lex Robertson)
posts.cookedHtml:
user profiles lack a place to fill in pronouns, this should be a fill-in form in the account options
pronouns should also displays next to or under profile name in account and when hovering over someone’s profile on a board

posts.author: ula (Ula)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes!! Wild that this isn’t an option yet
